preview: The data policy for CHESS ID4B beamline is to store raw data for six months and processed data for a year. Please process the data and copy it to your server if you need more time, or consult with your beamline scientist.

preview: The command or code ser_get(addr, d) reads incoming bytes into the data array d. The size of d determines how many bytes are to be read.
